metadata.description: Ethena issues USDe, a synthetic dollar backed primarily by delta-hedged perpetual futures positions on ETH and BTC plus a small on-chain stablecoin buffer. Users (whitelisted benefactors) deposit collateral via EthenaMinting and receive USDe; staking USDe in the sUSDe vault accrues funding rate and basis trade yield. The protocol is non-upgradeable for USDe, EthenaMinting and the sUSDe vault, but the sENA governance staking vault is a TransparentUpgradeableProxy controlled by a ProxyAdmin. The most consequential trust assumption is that $4.37B of USDe is backed primarily by off-chain CEX custodian accounts (Copper, Binance, OKX) that cannot be tracked on-chain — only $1.88B sits on-chain as a stablecoin buffer in EthenaMinting. Governance operates through Snapshot signaling and a 5-of-10 GnosisSafe with no on-chain timelock.

admins.name: Ethena Protocol Owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe)
admins.description: Holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on EthenaMinting, sUSDe, and sENA, COLLATERAL_MANAGER_ROLE on EthenaMinting, and is the Ownable owner of USDe, ENA, and the StakedENA ProxyAdmin. Can grant operational roles, change per-block mint/redeem caps, add or remove custodians, transfer collateral to whitelisted custodian wallets, upgrade the sENA implementation, replace USDe's minter address (which would remove all per-block mint caps), and blacklist users in the staking vaults. Controls $1.99B of reachable on-chain TVS and $5.93B of USDe + ENA token value.

The current admin retains all powers until acceptAdmin is invoked. notAdmin modifier ensures DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE cannot be granted via grantRole.

mitigations.label: future-only

Cannot move funds itself — the extraction happens in transferToCustody, which is bounded by the EthenaMinting buffer balance. The wallet is a setup parameter; existing custodian transfers and protocol balances are unaffected.

mitigations.label: non-admin-roles-only
mitigations.description: notAdmin modifier blocks DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE from being granted. Can grant MINTER/REDEEMER (require benefactor-signed orders + per-block caps), COLLATERAL_MANAGER (sends only to whitelisted custodians, bounded by buffer), or GATEKEEPER (defensive role with no extraction surface). The granted role alone cannot extract funds without additional admin-controlled setup (malicious benefactor or custodian).

mitigations.label: role-management-only
mitigations.description: notAdmin modifier blocks revocation of DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Only revokes operational roles (MINTER/REDEEMER/COLLATERAL_MANAGER/GATEKEEPER); revoking these prevents future operations but does not extract or freeze any existing funds.

mitigations.label: per-block-bounded
mitigations.description: MINTER_ROLE EOAs (currently 20 operational bots) alone CANNOT mint USDe freely — they can only execute orders signed by whitelisted benefactors, with on-chain collateral pulled via safeTransferFrom from the benefactor, routed to whitelisted custodians. Per call capped at globalConfig.globalMaxMintPerBlock (200M USDe today) and tokenConfig[asset].maxMintPerBlock. For stable collateral assets the USDe:collateral ratio is locked 1:1 by verifyStablesLimit (stablesDeltaLimit currently = 0 bps). Unbounded extraction requires DEFAULT_ADMIN to add malicious benefactor + malicious custodian + grant MINTER_ROLE; or bypassed entirely via USDe.setMinter.

mitigations.label: single-minter-gate
mitigations.description: Mints USDe to an arbitrary address. msg.sender == minter check; USDe.minter is currently set to EthenaMinting (0xe349...62D3), which enforces per-block caps (200M USDe), benefactor-signed orders, route whitelisting, and real on-chain collateral transfer. No EOA can call this function directly today. If USDe.setMinter is called by the owner (5/10 GnosisSafe) to replace minter with an attacker-controlled contract, ALL those constraints are bypassed and this function becomes an unlimited mint.

mitigations.label: vault-controlled
mitigations.description: Callable only by the StakedENA vault (immutable stakingVault). Used during the user unstake flow. Bounded by the silo's own ENA balance. Risk is contingent on the vault itself being compromised.

mitigations.label: per-block-bounded
mitigations.description: REDEEMER_ROLE EOAs alone CANNOT redeem USDe freely — they can only execute orders signed by whitelisted benefactors, burning USDe from the benefactor (who must have approved EthenaMinting) and releasing collateral to the benefactor-approved beneficiary. Per call capped at globalConfig.globalMaxRedeemPerBlock (10M USDe today) and tokenConfig[asset].maxRedeemPerBlock. Unbounded extraction requires DEFAULT_ADMIN compromise to add a malicious benefactor that signs over their existing USDe balance to an attacker beneficiary.

mitigations.label: bounded-by-buffer
mitigations.description: Transfers an asset from the EthenaMinting buffer to a wallet in the _custodianAddresses whitelist. Cannot send to arbitrary addresses. Bounded per call by the contracts own balance of the requested asset (USDT $31M + USDC $31M + USDtb $31M + PYUSD ~$0 currently, total buffer ~$92M). Drain requires either compromised whitelisted custodians, or compromised DEFAULT_ADMIN adding a malicious custodian via addCustodianAddress first.

mitigations.label: redeem-lock
mitigations.description: Gatekeeper sets globalMaxMintPerBlock and globalMaxRedeemPerBlock to 0, halting all future EthenaMinting mints and redeems block-by-block. Blocks the USDe → collateral exit path for existing holders for the duration; USDe remains transferable and stakeable and a DEX exit remains. No funds are extracted or devalued. Recoverable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (Dev Multisig) calling setGlobalMaxMintPerBlock / setGlobalMaxRedeemPerBlock to restore the caps.

mitigations.label: blacklist-bounded

Limited to users that admin has previously blacklisted via addToBlacklist. Bounded per call by the targeted user's sUSDe balance.
Capped at MAX_COOLDOWN_DURATION = 7,776,000 seconds (90 days). Bounded by require(duration <= MAX_COOLDOWN_DURATION).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: New cooldown duration only applies to cooldownAssets/cooldownShares calls made after the change. Cooldowns already in flight (with cooldownEnd already set) are not extended.

mitigations.label: deposit-only
mitigations.description: Transfers USDe from the caller into the vault as new rewards, then schedules linear vesting over vestingPeriod. Caller funds the vault; no extraction surface.

mitigations.label: per-user-freeze
mitigations.description: Grants FULL_RESTRICTED_STAKER_ROLE or SOFT_RESTRICTED_STAKER_ROLE to an address, blocking the target from transferring or withdrawing their sUSDe. Per call bounded to one address; targeted user's deposits are frozen until removed from blacklist. Enables subsequent redistributeLockedAmount which can extract those funds.

mitigations.label: unfreeze-only
mitigations.description: Removes blacklist role from an address, restoring their ability to transfer/withdraw sUSDe. No extraction surface; only unfreezes previously-frozen funds.

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes how long subsequent reward distributions vest. Already-vesting rewards continue under the original period; no effect on existing staker balances.

mitigations.label: init-one-shot
mitigations.description: Guarded by initializer modifier; can only be called once on the proxy. Already executed at deployment.

mitigations.label: deposit-only
mitigations.description: Transfers ENA from the caller into the vault as new rewards, then schedules linear vesting over vestingPeriod. Caller funds the vault; no extraction surface.

mitigations.label: per-user-freeze
mitigations.description: Grants BLACKLISTED_ROLE to an address (excluding the contract owner via notOwner modifier), blocking the target from transferring or withdrawing their sENA. Per call bounded to one address; enables subsequent redistributeLockedAmount.

mitigations.label: unfreeze-only
mitigations.description: Removes BLACKLISTED_ROLE from an address, restoring their ability to transfer/withdraw sENA. No extraction surface.

mitigations.label: unlimited-issuance-authority
mitigations.description: Replaces the address allowed to call USDe.mint. Single biggest risk in the protocol. The current minter (EthenaMinting at 0xe349...62D3) enforces: per-block caps (200M USDe globalMaxMintPerBlock), per-asset caps, benefactor-signed EIP-712/1271 orders, whitelist of benefactors and custodians, real on-chain collateral pull. None of these survive a setMinter call — a replacement minter has NO on-chain constraints and could mint unlimited USDe to any address, diluting the entire $3.98B USDe market cap. Only the USDe owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe) can call this; renounceOwnership reverts so this authority cannot be discarded.

mitigations.label: two-step-transfer
mitigations.description: Ownable2Step pattern: this call only sets pendingOwner; the new owner takes effect only after they call acceptOwnership. The current owner retains all authority until acceptance. renounceOwnership reverts on this contract — ownership cannot be discarded.
MINT_WAIT_PERIOD = 31,536,000 seconds (1 year) must elapse between any two successful mint calls (require block.timestamp - lastMintTimestamp >= MINT_WAIT_PERIOD).
Mint amount per call is capped at MAX_INFLATION = 10% of totalSupply (require amount <= totalSupply * 10 / 100).

mitigations.label: two-step-transfer
mitigations.description: Ownable2Step pattern: this call only sets pendingOwner; the new owner takes effect only after they call acceptOwnership. The current owner retains all authority until acceptance. renounceOwnership reverts on this contract — ownership cannot be discarded.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Re-points the sENA proxy admin to a new address. After the call, the new admin can perform upgrade / upgradeToAndCall directly on the proxy without going through this ProxyAdmin. Effectively transfers full upgrade authority.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Callable only via the TransparentUpgradeableProxy admin slot ($admin), which is set to the ProxyAdmin contract. Effectively governed by the ProxyAdmin owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe). Replaces the sENA implementation logic — a malicious implementation could drain the entire sENA vault (currently capped at the silo balance via the EnaSilo.withdraw fieldRef cap, but a new impl could bypass that).

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Owner-gated wrapper that calls upgradeTo / upgradeToAndCall on the StakedENA proxy. Effective bound is the sENA implementation — a malicious upgrade could rewrite all sENA logic, draining staked ENA. ProxyAdmin owner is the 5-of-10 GnosisSafe.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Callable only via the TransparentUpgradeableProxy admin slot ($admin), which is set to the ProxyAdmin contract. Effectively governed by the ProxyAdmin owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe). Replaces the sENA implementation logic — a malicious implementation could drain the entire sENA vault (currently capped at the silo balance via the EnaSilo.withdraw fieldRef cap, but a new impl could bypass that).

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Owner-gated wrapper that calls upgradeTo / upgradeToAndCall on the StakedENA proxy. Effective bound is the sENA implementation — a malicious upgrade could rewrite all sENA logic, draining staked ENA. ProxyAdmin owner is the 5-of-10 GnosisSafe.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Callable only via the TransparentUpgradeableProxy admin slot ($admin), which is set to the ProxyAdmin contract. Effectively governed by the ProxyAdmin owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe). Replaces the sENA implementation logic — a malicious implementation could drain the entire sENA vault (currently capped at the silo balance via the EnaSilo.withdraw fieldRef cap, but a new impl could bypass that).

mitigations.label: freeze-by-renounce
mitigations.description: Renounces ownership to the zero address. After the call, the sENA proxy can no longer be upgraded — the implementation is effectively locked. Reversible only by a deploy of a new ProxyAdmin (which would require the proxy admin pointer to be moved, which itself requires the current ProxyAdmin owner).

mitigations.label: two-step-or-renounce
mitigations.description: Standard Ownable transfer. Combined with renounceOwnership, the GnosisSafe could permanently disable upgrades by transferring to the zero address (this ProxyAdmin uses single-step Ownable, no acceptance required).

mitigations.label: always-reverts
mitigations.description: Overridden to revert unconditionally with CantRenounceOwnership — owner cannot abandon the role even if they try.

mitigations.label: bounded-by-self-balance
mitigations.description: Starts Ownable2Step handoff to a pending owner who must call acceptOwnership. A hostile new owner only gains the rescueTokens drain path, bounded by USDe currently held by this contract (does not touch sUSDe vault or USDe minting authority).

mitigations.label: bounded-by-self-balance
mitigations.description: Owner can sweep any ERC20 (or ETH, though this contract never holds ETH) from this contract to an arbitrary address. Drainable surface is bounded by USDe currently held; sUSDe vault deposits and USDe global supply are untouched.

mitigations.label: config-pointer
mitigations.description: Updates the mintContract pointer used by future approveToMintContract / setOperator calls. Does not move funds itself; existing token approvals on the previous mintContract remain in place until separately revoked.

mitigations.label: future-config
mitigations.description: Grants max ERC20 approval from this contract to the current mintContract (today the legit EthenaMinting). A redirected mintContract would still require chaining with setMintingContract; owner already has a more direct drain via rescueTokens, so this function adds no new extraction surface.

mitigations.label: DoS-only
mitigations.description: Owner revokes ERC20 approvals from a non-mintContract target (the current mintContract is explicitly blocked by an InvalidAddressCurrentMintContract guard). Worst case is revoking the USDe→sUSDe approval set in the constructor, breaking future transferInRewards calls until re-approved — no fund movement.

mitigations.label: rotation-only
mitigations.description: Rotates the operator EOA and re-delegates the signer on mintContract. The new operator can only call transferInRewards (push-only to STAKING_VAULT); no extraction surface granted by rotation.

mitigations.label: per-block-bounded
mitigations.description: REDEEMER_ROLE EOAs alone CANNOT redeem USDe freely — they can only execute orders signed by whitelisted benefactors, burning USDe from the benefactor (who must have approved EthenaMinting) and releasing collateral to the benefactor-approved beneficiary. Per call capped at globalConfig.globalMaxRedeemPerBlock (10M USDe today) and tokenConfig[asset].maxRedeemPerBlock. Unbounded extraction requires DEFAULT_ADMIN compromise to add a malicious benefactor that signs over their existing USDe balance to an attacker beneficiary.

admins.name: Ethena Mint/Redeem Operator (EOA)
admins.description: Mint/Redeem operator EOA on EthenaMinting. Same scope as 0xD089...

mitigations.label: per-block-bounded
mitigations.description: MINTER_ROLE EOAs (currently 20 operational bots) alone CANNOT mint USDe freely — they can only execute orders signed by whitelisted benefactors, with on-chain collateral pulled via safeTransferFrom from the benefactor, routed to whitelisted custodians. Per call capped at globalConfig.globalMaxMintPerBlock (200M USDe today) and tokenConfig[asset].maxMintPerBlock. For stable collateral assets the USDe:collateral ratio is locked 1:1 by verifyStablesLimit (stablesDeltaLimit currently = 0 bps). Unbounded extraction requires DEFAULT_ADMIN to add malicious benefactor + malicious custodian + grant MINTER_ROLE; or bypassed entirely via USDe.setMinter.

mitigations.label: single-minter-gate
mitigations.description: Mints USDe to an arbitrary address. msg.sender == minter check; USDe.minter is currently set to EthenaMinting (0xe349...62D3), which enforces per-block caps (200M USDe), benefactor-signed orders, route whitelisting, and real on-chain collateral transfer. No EOA can call this function directly today. If USDe.setMinter is called by the owner (5/10 GnosisSafe) to replace minter with an attacker-controlled contract, ALL those constraints are bypassed and this function becomes an unlimited mint.

If USDe.setMinter is called by the owner (5/10 GnosisSafe) to replace minter with an attacker-controlled contract, ALL those constraints are bypassed and this function becomes an unlimited mint.

mitigations.label: per-block-bounded
mitigations.description: MINTER_ROLE EOAs (currently 20 operational bots) alone CANNOT mint USDe freely — they can only execute orders signed by whitelisted benefactors, with on-chain collateral pulled via safeTransferFrom from the benefactor, routed to whitelisted custodians. Per call capped at globalConfig.globalMaxMintPerBlock (200M USDe today) and tokenConfig[asset].maxMintPerBlock. For stable collateral assets the USDe:collateral ratio is locked 1:1 by verifyStablesLimit (stablesDeltaLimit currently = 0 bps). Unbounded extraction requires DEFAULT_ADMIN to add malicious benefactor + malicious custodian + grant MINTER_ROLE; or bypassed entirely via USDe.setMinter.

mitigations.label: single-minter-gate

mitigations.label: vault-controlled

mitigations.label: per-block-bounded

Per call capped at globalConfig.globalMaxRedeemPerBlock (10M USDe today) and tokenConfig[asset].maxRedeemPerBlock. admins.name: Ethena Gatekeeper (EOA)

Cannot mint, redeem, or extract collateral itself.

mitigations.label: redeem-lock
mitigations.description: Gatekeeper sets globalMaxMintPerBlock and globalMaxRedeemPerBlock to 0, halting all future EthenaMinting mints and redeems block-by-block. Blocks the USDe → collateral exit path for existing holders for the duration; USDe remains transferable and stakeable and a DEX exit remains. No funds are extracted or devalued. Recoverable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (Dev Multisig) calling setGlobalMaxMintPerBlock / setGlobalMaxRedeemPerBlock to restore the caps.

funds.name: StakedUSDeV2 (sUSDe Vault)
funds.description: ERC4626 vault holding $1.78B of USDe deposited by sUSDe stakers. Withdrawals are gated by a configurable cooldown (currently 24 hours, max 90 days) after which USDe is released via USDeSilo.

funds.name: StakedENA (sENA Vault)
funds.description: ERC4626 vault holding $111.74M of ENA deposited by sENA stakers. Cooldown configurable up to 90 days; reward distributions vest over an admin-configurable period (max 90 days).

funds.name: USDeSilo
funds.description: Holds (N/A) of USDe set aside during the sUSDe cooldown period. Only the sUSDe vault contract can withdraw from the silo, which it does to release matured cooldowns to users.

funds.name: EnaSilo
funds.description: Holds (N/A) of ENA set aside during the sENA cooldown period. Only the sENA vault contract can withdraw from the silo.

funds.name: EthenaMinting (Stablecoin Buffer)
funds.description: Holds $92.67M in USDT, USDC, USDtb, and PYUSD as the on-chain settlement buffer between benefactor deposits and CEX custodian wallets. Represents only a fraction of total USDe backing; the bulk of collateral (delta-hedged ETH/BTC perpetuals + spot) is held off-chain in CEX custodian accounts (Copper, Binance, OKX) and is not visible on-chain.

funds.name: USDe Token
funds.description: USDe is Ethena's synthetic dollar. Outstanding supply has a market value of $4.37B, of which roughly half ($1.78B) currently sits in the sUSDe vault and (N/A) in the USDeSilo cooldown queue — both are accounted for inside the USDe total supply, not as separate balances. Mint authority is restricted to EthenaMinting (a single immutable minter), which can only be changed by the USDe owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe).

mitigations.description: notAdmin modifier blocks revocation of DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Only revokes operational roles (REWARDER/BLACKLIST_MANAGER/etc.); revoking these prevents future operations but does not extract or freeze any existing funds.

mitigations.label: mistakenly-sent-only
mitigations.description: Guarded by require(token != asset()): cannot rescue USDe (the underlying staked asset). Only moves tokens accidentally sent to the contract; existing staker deposits and yield are untouched.

mitigations.label: blacklist-bounded
mitigations.description: Burns the sUSDe balance of a FULL_RESTRICTED_STAKER and mints it to an arbitrary recipient (or to address(0) to send back into the vesting pool). Limited to users that admin has previously blacklisted via addToBlacklist. Bounded per call by the targeted user's sUSDe balance.
Capped at MAX_COOLDOWN_DURATION = 7,776,000 seconds (90 days). Bounded by require(duration <= MAX_COOLDOWN_DURATION).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: New cooldown duration only applies to cooldownAssets/cooldownShares calls made after the change. Cooldowns already in flight (with cooldownEnd already set) are not extended.

mitigations.label: deposit-only
mitigations.description: Transfers USDe from the caller into the vault as new rewards, then schedules linear vesting over vestingPeriod. Caller funds the vault; no extraction surface.

mitigations.label: per-user-freeze
mitigations.description: Grants FULL_RESTRICTED_STAKER_ROLE or SOFT_RESTRICTED_STAKER_ROLE to an address, blocking the target from transferring or withdrawing their sUSDe. Per call bounded to one address; targeted user's deposits are frozen until removed from blacklist. Enables subsequent redistributeLockedAmount which can extract those funds.

mitigations.label: unfreeze-only
mitigations.description: Removes blacklist role from an address, restoring their ability to transfer/withdraw sUSDe. No extraction surface; only unfreezes previously-frozen funds.

mitigations.label: two-step-transfer
mitigations.description: SingleAdminAccessControl two-step pattern: this call only sets _pendingDefaultAdmin; the new admin only takes effect after they call acceptAdmin themselves. The current admin retains all powers until acceptAdmin is invoked. notAdmin modifier ensures DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE cannot be granted via grantRole.

mitigations.label: non-admin-roles-only
mitigations.description: notAdmin modifier blocks DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE from being granted. Can grant REWARDER (deposit-only role), BLACKLIST_MANAGER (per-user freeze, no extraction), or STAKER_ROLE variants (apply restriction to a user). None of these grantable roles can extract funds; redistributeLockedAmount requires DEFAULT_ADMIN itself.

mitigations.label: role-management-only
mitigations.description: notAdmin modifier blocks revocation of DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Only revokes operational roles (REWARDER/BLACKLIST_MANAGER/etc.); revoking these prevents future operations but does not extract or freeze any existing funds.

mitigations.label: mistakenly-sent-only
mitigations.description: Guarded by require(token != asset()): cannot rescue ENA (the underlying staked asset). Only moves tokens accidentally sent to the contract; existing staker deposits and yield are untouched.

mitigations.label: blacklist-bounded
mitigations.description: Burns the sENA balance of a BLACKLISTED user and mints it to an arbitrary recipient (or to address(0) to send back into the vesting pool). Limited to users admin has previously blacklisted via addToBlacklist. Bounded per call by the targeted user's sENA balance.
Capped at MAX_COOLDOWN_DURATION = 7,776,000 seconds (90 days). Bounded by require(duration <= MAX_COOLDOWN_DURATION).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: New cooldown duration only applies to cooldownAssets/cooldownShares calls made after the change. Cooldowns already in flight are not extended.
Capped at MAX_VESTING_PERIOD = 7,776,000 seconds (90 days). Bounded by require(newVestingPeriod <= MAX_VESTING_PERIOD).

mitigations.label: future-only
mitigations.description: Changes how long subsequent reward distributions vest. Already-vesting rewards continue under the original period; no effect on existing staker balances.

mitigations.label: init-one-shot
mitigations.description: Guarded by initializer modifier; can only be called once on the proxy. Already executed at deployment.

mitigations.label: deposit-only
mitigations.description: Transfers ENA from the caller into the vault as new rewards, then schedules linear vesting over vestingPeriod. Caller funds the vault; no extraction surface.

mitigations.label: per-user-freeze
mitigations.description: Grants BLACKLISTED_ROLE to an address (excluding the contract owner via notOwner modifier), blocking the target from transferring or withdrawing their sENA. Per call bounded to one address; enables subsequent redistributeLockedAmount.

mitigations.label: unfreeze-only
mitigations.description: Removes BLACKLISTED_ROLE from an address, restoring their ability to transfer/withdraw sENA. No extraction surface.

mitigations.label: unlimited-issuance-authority
mitigations.description: Replaces the address allowed to call USDe.mint. Single biggest risk in the protocol. The current minter (EthenaMinting at 0xe349...62D3) enforces: per-block caps (200M USDe globalMaxMintPerBlock), per-asset caps, benefactor-signed EIP-712/1271 orders, whitelist of benefactors and custodians, real on-chain collateral pull. None of these survive a setMinter call — a replacement minter has NO on-chain constraints and could mint unlimited USDe to any address, diluting the entire $3.98B USDe market cap. Only the USDe owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe) can call this; renounceOwnership reverts so this authority cannot be discarded.

mitigations.label: two-step-transfer
mitigations.description: Ownable2Step pattern: this call only sets pendingOwner; the new owner takes effect only after they call acceptOwnership. The current owner retains all authority until acceptance. renounceOwnership reverts on this contract — ownership cannot be discarded.
MINT_WAIT_PERIOD = 31,536,000 seconds (1 year) must elapse between any two successful mint calls (require block.timestamp - lastMintTimestamp >= MINT_WAIT_PERIOD).
Mint amount per call is capped at MAX_INFLATION = 10% of totalSupply (require amount <= totalSupply * 10 / 100).

mitigations.label: two-step-transfer
mitigations.description: Ownable2Step pattern: this call only sets pendingOwner; the new owner takes effect only after they call acceptOwnership. The current owner retains all authority until acceptance. renounceOwnership reverts on this contract — ownership cannot be discarded.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Re-points the sENA proxy admin to a new address. After the call, the new admin can perform upgrade / upgradeToAndCall directly on the proxy without going through this ProxyAdmin. Effectively transfers full upgrade authority.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Callable only via the TransparentUpgradeableProxy admin slot ($admin), which is set to the ProxyAdmin contract. Effectively governed by the ProxyAdmin owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe). Replaces the sENA implementation logic — a malicious implementation could drain the entire sENA vault (currently capped at the silo balance via the EnaSilo.withdraw fieldRef cap, but a new impl could bypass that).

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Owner-gated wrapper that calls upgradeTo / upgradeToAndCall on the StakedENA proxy. Effective bound is the sENA implementation — a malicious upgrade could rewrite all sENA logic, draining staked ENA. ProxyAdmin owner is the 5-of-10 GnosisSafe.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Callable only via the TransparentUpgradeableProxy admin slot ($admin), which is set to the ProxyAdmin contract. Effectively governed by the ProxyAdmin owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe). Replaces the sENA implementation logic — a malicious implementation could drain the entire sENA vault (currently capped at the silo balance via the EnaSilo.withdraw fieldRef cap, but a new impl could bypass that).

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Owner-gated wrapper that calls upgradeTo / upgradeToAndCall on the StakedENA proxy. Effective bound is the sENA implementation — a malicious upgrade could rewrite all sENA logic, draining staked ENA. ProxyAdmin owner is the 5-of-10 GnosisSafe.

mitigations.label: proxy-admin-controlled
mitigations.description: Callable only via the TransparentUpgradeableProxy admin slot ($admin), which is set to the ProxyAdmin contract. Effectively governed by the ProxyAdmin owner (5-of-10 GnosisSafe). Replaces the sENA implementation logic — a malicious implementation could drain the entire sENA vault (currently capped at the silo balance via the EnaSilo.withdraw fieldRef cap, but a new impl could bypass that).

mitigations.label: freeze-by-renounce
mitigations.description: Renounces ownership to the zero address. After the call, the sENA proxy can no longer be upgraded — the implementation is effectively locked. Reversible only by a deploy of a new ProxyAdmin (which would require the proxy admin pointer to be moved, which itself requires the current ProxyAdmin owner).

mitigations.label: two-step-or-renounce
mitigations.description: Standard Ownable transfer. Combined with renounceOwnership, the GnosisSafe could permanently disable upgrades by transferring to the zero address (this ProxyAdmin uses single-step Ownable, no acceptance required).

mitigations.label: always-reverts
mitigations.description: Overridden to revert unconditionally with CantRenounceOwnership — owner cannot abandon the role even if they try.

mitigations.label: bounded-by-self-balance
mitigations.description: Starts Ownable2Step handoff to a pending owner who must call acceptOwnership. A hostile new owner only gains the rescueTokens drain path, bounded by USDe currently held by this contract (does not touch sUSDe vault or USDe minting authority).

mitigations.label: bounded-by-self-balance
mitigations.description: Owner can sweep any ERC20 (or ETH, though this contract never holds ETH) from this contract to an arbitrary address. Drainable surface is bounded by USDe currently held; sUSDe vault deposits and USDe global supply are untouched.

mitigations.label: config-pointer
mitigations.description: Updates the mintContract pointer used by future approveToMintContract / setOperator calls. Does not move funds itself; existing token approvals on the previous mintContract remain in place until separately revoked.

mitigations.label: future-config
mitigations.description: Grants max ERC20 approval from this contract to the current mintContract (today the legit EthenaMinting). A redirected mintContract would still require chaining with setMintingContract; owner already has a more direct drain via rescueTokens, so this function adds no new extraction surface.

mitigations.label: DoS-only
mitigations.description: Owner revokes ERC20 approvals from a non-mintContract target (the current mintContract is explicitly blocked by an InvalidAddressCurrentMintContract guard). Worst case is revoking the USDe→sUSDe approval set in the constructor, breaking future transferInRewards calls until re-approved — no fund movement.

mitigations.label: rotation-only
mitigations.description: Rotates the operator EOA and re-delegates the signer on mintContract. The new operator can only call transferInRewards (push-only to STAKING_VAULT); no extraction surface granted by rotation.

mitigations.label: push-only-to-vault
mitigations.description: Operator can only push USDe from this contract into the sUSDe vault, where it vests to stakers over the 8h reward cycle. Destination is hardcoded to STAKING_VAULT and amount must satisfy USDE_TOKEN.balanceOf(this) >= amount; no destination control or theft surface.
